concerns.text: Task T025 (Color Entropy) is marked 'FAILED: unspecified' and has no active implementation task covering FR-003. While T053 exists as a fix task, it is currently unchecked `[ ]`. The spec requires FR-003 (Color Entropy) to be implemented; the current task list leaves this requirement unimplemented in the active plan.

Task T031 (Pearson/Regression) is marked 'FAILED: unspecified' and lacks a concrete implementation description for FR-006/FR-007. T054 is the fix task but is unchecked `[ ]`. Without T054 completion, the core statistical analysis requirements (FR-006, FR-007) are not covered by an active task.

Task T041 (Bootstrap Resampling) is marked 'FAILED: unspecified' and T055 (the fix) is unchecked `[ ]`. FR-009 requires bootstrap resampling; currently, no active task implements this, leaving the sensitivity analysis requirement uncovered.

Task T034b (PCA-based Regression) is marked 'FAILED: unspecified' and T054 (the fix) is unchecked `[ ]`. FR-012 mandates PCA usage if VIF >= 5. The current task list has no active implementation for this conditional logic.

Task T037b (Citations) is marked 'FAILED: unspecified' and T056 (the fix) is unchecked `[ ]`. SC-006 requires validated methods with citable documentation. The current task list leaves the generation of these citations unimplemented.

Tasks T053, T054, T055, and T056 are marked as unchecked `[ ]` but are critical for covering FR-003, FR-006/007, FR-009, FR-012, and SC-006. The presence of 'FAILED' markers on the original tasks (T025, T031, T041, T034b, T037b) combined with unchecked fix tasks indicates a gap in the active implementation plan. These tasks must be marked `[X]` (if the fix is considered part of the original task logic) or the original tasks must be updated to reflect the fix, otherwise the spec requirements are not covered by an active 'to-do'.
